channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources

item.title: 🇮🇹🇷🇺 Italy Summons Russian Ambassador After State TV Host Insults PM Meloni
item.description: Italy formally protested after Russian propagandist Vladimir Solovyov used vulgar insults against Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni on state TV, calling her a "fascist" and "certified idiot." Foreign Minister Tajani summoned Ambassador Paramonov to register official protest.
item.dc:creator: United24 Media

item.title: 🇯🇵⚔️ Japan Lifts Ban on Lethal Weapons Exports in Historic Defense Policy Shift
item.description: Japan revised its Three Principles on Transfer of Defense Equipment, allowing exports of warships, missiles, and air defense systems to 17 partner nations. PAC-3 MSE interceptors for Patriot systems and Type 11/03 air defense systems now available for export amid global shortages.
item.dc:creator: Defence UA

item.title: 🇭🇺🏛️ Peter Magyar to Become Hungary PM on May 9 After Landslide Victory
item.description: Tisza Party leader Peter Magyar will be elected prime minister on May 9 after winning 141 of 199 parliamentary seats. Viktor Orban acknowledged defeat following record 79.56% voter turnout in Hungary's April 12 elections.
item.dc:creator: TASS

item.title: 🇪🇺🛢️ Central and Eastern Europe Faces Energy Shock Stress Test From Hormuz Crisis
item.description: The Iran war-driven oil shock hits CEE3 and Turkey at a fragile moment with thin fiscal space and newly restored disinflation. Analysis shows Czech Republic best positioned to weather shock; Turkey most vulnerable due to energy sensitivity and limited external backstops.
item.dc:creator: ING Think

item.title: 🇷🇺🇰🇵 Russian Interior Minister Arrives in North Korea for Talks
item.description: Russian Interior Minister Vladimir Kolokoltsev arrived in North Korea for talks on cooperation between the two allies, deepening ties between Moscow and Pyongyang amid the Ukraine war.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇦🔫 Mass Shooting Reignites Push to Loosen Gun Laws in Ukraine
item.description: A deadly shooting in Kyiv has fueled calls to relax restrictions on gun ownership for self-defense in Ukraine, a country scarred by years of war against Russia.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇸📉 Trump Approval on Economy Falls in AP-NORC Poll
item.description: President Donald Trump's approval rating on the economy has slumped over the past month as the Iran war and cost of living concerns weigh on public sentiment.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: 🌍💰 World Bank Climate Financing at Risk as Trump Seeks to Kill Plans
item.description: The Trump administration is moving to end the World Bank's climate financing initiatives while world leaders fight to preserve them, highlighting a growing transatlantic divide.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire as Peace Talks Remain Uncertain
item.description: President Trump said he would extend the ceasefire with Iran at Pakistan's request, but warned the US military remains ready if talks fail to materialize.
item.dc:creator: CBS News

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Overhauls Defense Export Rules, Opens Door to Global Arms Market
item.description: Japan has scrapped decades-old restrictions on overseas arms sales, allowing exports of warships, missiles and other weapons in a major shift away from its pacifist post-war stance.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: ☢️ NATO Criticizes Russian and Chinese Nuclear Stances Ahead of Conference
item.description: NATO urged Russia and China to work with the United States on nuclear stability and transparency at an upcoming international conference, criticizing their current nuclear arms policies.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Trump China Policy Drifts as Tariff Strategy Stalls
item.description: President Trumps promised tariff overhaul of US-China relations has stalled, leaving Washington without a clear strategy as Beijing adapts and tensions persist.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US-Iran Peace Talks Uncertain as Ceasefire Deadline Looms
item.description: The United States and Iran have signaled they will hold new ceasefire talks in Islamabad, but uncertainty is growing about whether negotiations will proceed as the two-week ceasefire deadline approaches.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: ⛪ Pope Leo Warns Humanity Future Compromised by Wars
item.description: In a forceful speech during his Africa tour, Pope Leo warned that humanitys future is at risk due to ongoing wars and a breakdown of international law.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Convenes Emergency Energy Security Meeting as Hormuz Disruption Threatens Oil Supply
item.description: Premier Li Qiang led a State Council session on energy security as China confronts the impact of the Strait of Hormuz crisis. Xi Jinping called for the strait to remain open in his first public statement on the blocked waterway.
item.dc:creator: SCMP

item.title: 🇷🇺🇰🇵 Russia-North Korea Open First Land Bridge Between Countries
item.description: Russia and North Korea held a ceremony for a new 5-kilometer bridge linking the countries by land for the first time. The bridge for cars and trucks marks a deepening of ties between Moscow and Pyongyang.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🇪🇪🇺🇦 Estonia Rejects Ukraine Warnings of Russian Threat to Baltics
item.description: Estonian parliament Foreign Affairs Committee chairman Marko Mihkelson pushed back against Ukrainian warnings that the Baltics could be Russias next target, saying such narratives do not help Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah Fires Rockets at Israeli Troops in Southern Lebanon
item.description: The Israeli military said Hezbollah fired rockets toward its troops in a blatant violation of the ceasefire agreement, as the US-Iran truce deadline nears. Trump accused Iran of violating the ceasefire multiple times.
item.dc:creator: France 24

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Destroys Mass Graves Near Mariupol, Satellite Images Suggest
item.description: Satellite imagery indicates Russia has destroyed mass graves near Mariupol used to bury residents who died during the 2022 siege. Ukraines Center for the Study of Occupation called it evidence of attempted cover-up.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🇵🇭 US and Allies Launch Major Combat Drills in Philippines as Japan Joins for First Time
item.description: Over 17,000 US and Filipino troops began the annual Balikatan exercises, with Japan's Self-Defense Forces participating fully for the first time. The drills include live-fire exercises near the South China Sea and Taiwan Strait, signaling strengthened deterrence against Chinese aggression despite US focus on the Iran conflict.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Ends Decades-Long Ban on Lethal Weapons Exports in Major Policy Shift
item.description: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi's Cabinet approved scrapping Japan's postwar ban on lethal weapons exports, allowing sales of warships and missiles to 17 partner countries. The historic shift aims to bolster Japan's defense industry amid regional security concerns, drawing criticism from China.
item.dc:creator: NBC News

item.title: 🏛️ Trump's Fed Chair Nominee Kevin Warsh Faces Senate Grilling on Independence and Wealth
item.description: Kevin Warsh testified before the Senate Banking Committee, pledging to run an independent Federal Reserve while facing intense Democratic scrutiny over his $131-209 million in assets and ties to hedge fund billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller. Elizabeth Warren called him 'uniquely ill-suited' for the role.
item.dc:creator: Barron's

item.title: 🥶 US Army Tests New Arctic Vehicles and Drones in Alaska to Counter Russia and China
item.description: CNN gained exclusive access to the 11th Airborne 'Arctic Angels' in northern Alaska as they test next-generation cold-weather vehicles and combat drones. The preparations reflect growing US concern over Russian and Chinese activity in the increasingly strategic Arctic region.
item.dc:creator: CNN

item.title: 🇳🇱✈️🇷🇺 NATO Fighter Jets Intercept Russian Bombers Over Baltic Sea
item.description: French Rafale fighters deployed from Lithuania intercepted Russian bombers and fighter jets flying over the Baltic Sea, marking another escalation in NATO-Russia tensions.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: 🇳🇱🇪🇺⚠️ Dutch Intelligence Warns Europe Must Focus on Own Security
item.description: The Dutch MIVD intelligence agency warned that Europe must take greater responsibility for its own security, citing pressure on Western alliances and China's support for Russia's war in Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: Reuters
